creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
This commit: https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?h=stable/13&id=5f7ddb1456d5b926e85710da690bf548ef0c9fc8

If we look for dates here: https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/log/sys/sys/param.h?h=stable/13 - this commit was after 1300522 and before 1300523.

Add please entry with "(not changed)" "5f7ddb1456d5" "December 6, 2021"
"13.0-STABLE after updating llvm, clang, compiler-rt, libc++, libunwind, lld, lldb and openmp to llvmorg-13-init-16847-g88e66fa60ae5, a.k.a. 13.0.0 release."
